records.display_name: 2014 Bus Priority and Safety Improvement Project - Utica Avenue

description: Transit improvements including offset and curbside bus lanes on 1.3 miles of Utica Av corridor from St. John's Pl to Church Av. Traffic and safety improvements including left-turn restrictions and left-turn bay additions. Parking changes: +19 parking spaces near Eastern Parkway, -22 parking spaces along southern part of corridor, new loading zones.

2014 bus priority and safety improvements on Utica Avenue including offset and curbside bus lanes on 1.3 miles from St. John's Pl to Church Av, left-turn restrictions, left-turn bay additions, parking changes (+19 spaces near Eastern Parkway, -22 spaces along southern part of corridor), and new loading zones.

Offset and curbside bus lanes on 1.3 miles of Utica Av corridor from St. John's Pl to Church Av. Left-turn restrictions and bay additions. Parking changes near Eastern Parkway and along southern part of corridor.

records.display_name: Utica Avenue Select Bus Service

description: Build on existing Bus Priority and Safety Project to upgrade B46 Limited to B46 SBS. Includes off-board fare collection, additional bus lanes, transit signal priority, service planning changes, and capital improvements at SBS stations.

Proposed Select Bus Service on Utica Avenue, building on existing 2014 Bus Priority and Safety Improvements to upgrade B46 Limited to B46 SBS. Includes off-board fare collection, additional bus lanes, transit signal priority, service planning changes, and capital improvements at SBS stations.
Project to upgrade the B46 limited bus to Select Bus Service along the Utica Avenue corridor in Brooklyn

Proposed upgrade of B46 Limited to B46 SBS. Building on existing Bus Priority and Safety Project. May include off-board fare collection, additional bus lanes, transit signal priority, service planning changes, and capital improvements at SBS stations.

Upgrade B46 Limited to B46 SBS on Utica Avenue corridor. Includes off-board fare collection, dedicated bus lanes extension south of Church Avenue, transit signal priority, service changes, and capital improvements at SBS stations.
B46 Limited to be upgraded to B46 SBS, which will include off-board fare collection, dedicated bus lanes, transit signal priority, service changes, and capital improvements at SBS stations.

B46 Limited to be upgraded to B46 SBS on Utica Avenue, including off-board fare collection, dedicated bus lanes (extension south of Church Avenue), transit signal priority, service changes, and capital improvements at SBS stations.

Proposed Select Bus Service along the Utica Avenue B46 corridor. Includes draft service plan for B46 SBS and B46 local, street design changes, bus lanes, left-turn bays/restrictions, transit signal priority, bus bulbs, real-time passenger information, and improved station amenities.

Proposed Select Bus Service on the Utica Avenue B46 corridor in Brooklyn. The northern terminal of B46 SBS will be DeKalb Avenue. B46 SBS will make limited stops south of Avenue H. B46 Local will be extended to Williamsburg Bridge Plaza 24 hours a day. Standard (non-articulated) buses will be used. Goals include improving bus speed and reliability, improving bus customer comfort and convenience, and better organizing the street to improve pedestrian safety and driver navigability.
B46 Limited to be upgraded to B46 SBS on Utica Avenue corridor, serving Brooklyn from Williamsburg Bridge Plaza to Kings Plaza
B46 Limited to be upgraded to B46 SBS along Utica Avenue corridor in Brooklyn

Proposed B46 Select Bus Service on Utica Avenue corridor. Northern terminal at DeKalb Avenue. B46 SBS will make limited stops south of Avenue H. B46 Local extended to Williamsburg Bridge Plaza 24 hours a day. Standard (non-articulated) buses. Launch planned for September 2015.
B46 Limited to be upgraded to B46 SBS, including off-board fare collection, dedicated bus lanes, transit signal priority, service changes, capital improvements at SBS stations

Implementation of Select Bus Service on Utica Avenue B46 corridor including bus lanes, left-turn bays, turn restrictions, and pedestrian islands. St. Johns Place to Church Avenue phase implemented Summer 2014; Church Avenue to Fillmore Avenue phase implementing August-September 2015.
Proposed B46 Select Bus Service along Utica Avenue in Brooklyn, including draft service plan and street design changes

B46 Select Bus Service on Utica Avenue, running between Avenue U (Kings Plaza) and DeKalb Avenue. The Utica Avenue B46 corridor was identified as a candidate for SBS in the 2009 Bus Rapid Transit Phase II Study.
B46 Select Bus Service along the Utica Avenue corridor between Avenue U (Kings Plaza) and DeKalb Avenue
Conversion of B46 Limited to Select Bus Service on Utica Avenue, with dedicated bus lanes, transit signal priority, off-board fare payment, real-time information, and bus bulbs
SBS service on Utica Avenue from Avenue U (Kings Plaza) to DeKalb Avenue, with capital improvements and bus lane improvements

description: SBS on Utica Avenue on the B46 bus route in Brooklyn
Select Bus Service on Utica Avenue. Proposed weekday frequency: 3 min AM Peak, 7 min Midday, 5 min PM Peak, 5 min Early Evening, 8 min Late Evening.
B46 Limited-Stop buses operate 7 days a week, making limited stops between DeKalb Av/Malcolm X Blvd and Avenue H/Utica Av, and all stops along the rest of the route
B46 Limited-Stop bus route in Brooklyn, operates 7 days a week. Limited stops between DeKalb Av/Malcolm X Blvd and Avenue H/Utica Av, all stops along rest of route.

B46 Limited generally travels between Kings Plaza and Williamsburg Bridge Plaza; makes all local stops north of DeKalb Ave and south of Ave H

SBS route between Avenue U (Kings Plaza) and DeKalb Avenue
Brooklyn's busiest bus route with 38,000 daily riders, upgraded to SBS in 2016, upgraded to articulated buses in January 2020
Upgraded to Select Bus Service in 2016; Brooklyn's busiest bus route with 38,000 daily riders
Brooklyn's busiest bus route (38,000 daily riders). Connects Bed-Stuy to 3 4 A C J Z + 30 bus routes. Upgraded to Select Bus Service in 2016. Upgraded to articulated buses in January 2020.
B46 Select Bus Service, Brooklyn's busiest bus route with 38,000 daily riders. Launched July 2016. Connects Bed-Stuy to subway lines and 30 bus routes.
Existing B46 Limited-stop service running along Utica Avenue and Malcolm X Boulevard. Limited stops will either be converted to SBS stops or local stops.
Proposed B46 Select Bus Service on Utica Avenue. Northern terminal at DeKalb Av, making SBS stops from DeKalb Av to Avenue U (Kings Plaza). Will not make local stops south of Avenue H.
